testcase.name: 3210-dimension-relationship-node-relationship-source-testcase
Dimension Relationship Node Relationship Source Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a dimension relationship node with different relationship sources

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with the relationship source omitted
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. No relationship source is specified, so the full tree of members starting from the domain root(s) is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with the relationship source omitted, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. No relationship source is specified, so the full tree of members starting from the domain root(s) is included.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node for part of a domain
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. The specified relationship source selects only part of the domain of the dimension - members that are descendants of f4. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node for part of a domain, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. The specified relationship source selects only part of the domain of the dimension - members that are descendants of f4.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with multiple relationship sources
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, resulting in a tree with multiple roots. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with multiple relationship sources, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, resulting in a tree with multiple roots.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with invalid (non-existent) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies a non-existent concept as the relationship source.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with invalid (hypercube) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies a hypercube as the relationship source.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with invalid (dimension) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies a dimension as the relationship source.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with invalid (xfi:root) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies xfi:root as the relationship source.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a relationship source expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. The relationship source is specified by an XPath expression that evaluates to a QName. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a relationship source expression, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. The relationship source is specified by an XPath expression that evaluates to a QName.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with both relationship sources and relationship source expressions
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, using a combination of literal QNames and XPath expressions, resulting in a tree with multiple roots. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with both relationship sources and relationship source expressions, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, using a combination of literal QNames and XPath expressions, resulting in a tree with multiple roots.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a relationship source expression that does not evaluate to a QName
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies a relationship source using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a QName.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a relationship source expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies a relationship source using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one QName.
